demo.title: 1claw-secrets.sh
demo.code:
# Validate API connectivity and credential setup
./1claw/scripts/validate-setup.sh

# Exchange an ocv_ agent key for a short-lived JWT
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST https://api.1claw.xyz/v1/auth/agent-token \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"api_key":"ocv_..."}' | jq -r '.access_token')

# Store a Bankr key in the vault
curl -s -X PUT "https://api.1claw.xyz/v1/vaults/$VAULT_ID/secrets/keys/bankr-api-key" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"value":"bk_...","type":"api_key"}'

setup: Configure MCP with a pinned package version: `@1claw/mcp@0.31.1`
